businessQuestion: Which suppliers have the highest defect rates?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.SUPPLIER_NAME,
    AVG(DEFECT_RATE_PCT) AS DEFECT_RATE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SUPPLIER_DELIVERY FSD
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_SUPPLIER DS
ON FSD.SUPPLIER_KEY=DS.SUPPLIER_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY DEFECT_RATE DESC;
businessContext: Quality teams want to reduce defective inventory and supplier-related losses.
